search_query: how to get better at sports
retrieved_result: How to Build a Monster Truck by Peggy Deland. A monster truck is a normal-sized truck body with abnormally large tires and oversized suspension to accommodate them. Most monster trucks are used as show cars or conversation pieces, although some are used for demonstrations and "monster truck shows"
Decision_Reason: The page discusses building a monster truck, not athletic skills or strategies for improving sports performance.
